top_patterns.description: Starts with a direct call or statement, often ending with a hashtag.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Often in advocacy or movement-related posts.
example_quotes: Help us reach our goal of 1 million by tagging 4 friends and encouraging them to send a postcard – one for each of the 4 Americans taken by gun violence every hour. #endgunviolencetogether
Take 30 seconds to go to TOMS.com and send your Representative a postcard demanding they pass this bill.

top_patterns.description: Expresses personal feelings or gratitude, often with a specific event or moment.
top_patterns.structure_template: I am/We are + emotion/thanks + for + specific reason
top_patterns.when_it_appears: In family, personal, or community moments.
example_quotes: Feeling so blessed to be a dad, to learn so much from this little soul about curiosity, compassion, and joy.
Thank you @toms men’s design team for bringing this waterproof boot to the line this winter.

top_patterns.description: Shares a quote, often with attribution or context.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: In moments of inspiration or reflection.
example_quotes: The mountains are calling and I must go” - Muir
Today, Congress introduced a bill to require universal background checks for gun sales...

top_patterns.description: Announces a new content or event, directing followers to link in bio.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: In podcast, video, or campaign promotions.
example_quotes: Loved doing @erikanderslang podcast and talking through life, golf, and finding your purpose. Full podcast link in bio.
Thanks @lewishowes for having me on the show. The past 6 weeks have been the most meaningful of my entrepreneurial life.

archetypal_structures.formula: I/We + personal insight/feeling + call to action
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Connects personally while motivating followers to act.
example_quotes: I am here LA. I am alive. And I am ready to make shit happen.
Help us reach our goal of 1 million by tagging 4 friends...

archetypal_structures.formula: Describes an event + personal or collective reflection
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Shares experience and reinforces community or movement.
example_quotes: Yesterday was a very important day. As part of our efforts to #EndGunViolenceTogether...
Saturday morning dip with little man. Might be our newest tradition.
The mountains are calling and I must go” - Muir
Don’t worry dad, he is a nice monster. He is our friend.

closers: Let’s see what you come up with!
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 10-20 words.
language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal, often single sentences or short paragraphs.

example_quotes: Feeling so blessed to be a dad, to learn so much from this little soul.
I am here LA. I am alive. And I am ready to make shit happen.
Help us reach our goal of 1 million by tagging 4 friends.
Take 30 seconds to go to TOMS.com and send your Representative a postcard.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Builds community and visibility around causes.
example_quotes: #endgunviolenceTogther
#EndGunViolenceTogether

anti_patterns: Generic motivational quotes without personal touch

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent personal, action-oriented, community-focused, emotionally authentic.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct calls to action, increased use of hashtags, emphasis on advocacy.
